visualizerParams.title: Capacitor Series Formula Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The series capacitance calculation is incorrect. It seems the reciprocal relationship is being handled incorrectly in the formula. Find and fix the logic flaw.

solution.explanation: The formula for capacitors in series is `1 / Ceq = 1/C1 + 1/C2 + ...`. Therefore, `Ceq = 1 / (1/C1 + 1/C2 + ...)`. The buggy code only calculated the sum of reciprocals, forgetting to take the final reciprocal of that sum.
